The Problem

Network management shouldn't require
a six-figure vendor contract.

SpanGate gives IT teams the tools to generate configs, monitor devices, and track assets — from a browser. No proprietary hardware. No sales team. No lock-in.

The Platform
THREE TOOLS. ONE PLATFORM.

Mix and match. Build your perfect stack. Cancel anytime.

01 LIVE NOW

ConfigWizard

Generate production-ready network configs for Cisco, Aruba, and Juniper in minutes. AI security review built in.

  • Version history & profiles

$9.99/mo billed annually
Launch ConfigWizard →
02 COMING SOON

Network Monitor

Lightweight agent monitors up/down status and backs up configs weekly. Detect unauthorized changes instantly.

  • ICMP ping monitoring (60s intervals)
  • Weekly config backups via SSH
  • Change detection & alerts
  • 30-day config retention
  • Runs on Pi, VM, or desktop
starting at $99/mo 50–1,000 devices
03 PLANNED

Asset Tracker

IT asset inventory with QR code labels, warranty tracking, and E-Rate export for Texas school districts.

  • CSV import & bulk upload
  • QR code generation for labels
  • Warranty date alerts
  • E-Rate export (Texas schools)
  • Custom fields & tags
starting at $49/mo 250–10,000 assets

FAQ

COMMON QUESTIONS.

Do my network credentials ever leave the building?+
No. SSH credentials are encrypted locally using your own API key. Only the encrypted blob and config text reach the cloud — credentials never leave your site.
What hardware does Network Monitor run on?+
Raspberry Pi Zero 2W (up to 25 devices), Pi 4 4GB (up to 150), Pi 5 8GB (up to 500), or any Linux VM or Windows desktop. One-command install on Linux/Pi.
What network vendors are supported?+
Cisco IOS/IOS-XE, Aruba CX (AOS-CX), and Juniper JunOS — the three most widely deployed vendors in enterprise and mid-market networks.
Can I buy just one product?+
Yes — all three products are completely à la carte. Buy ConfigWizard only, Network Monitor only, or mix and match. Never forced into a bundle.
Do I need to talk to sales or schedule a setup call?+
Never. SpanGate is 100% self-serve. Sign up, start using it, scale at your own pace. No sales calls, no onboarding, no contracts to negotiate.
Is there a free tier?+
Yes. ConfigWizard's first three wizard steps are free with no account required. Network Monitor and Asset Tracker are paid only but month-to-month — cancel anytime.
Where is my data stored?+
Securely in the cloud with row-level security — only you can see your own configs and asset records. No other user or admin can access your data.

STOP DOING IT
BY HAND.
